title: Tala Ribbed Glass Ramekin, 190ml Oven Safe Dessert Bowl, Classic Glass Cup for Baking, Serving, & Meal Prep, Heat Resistant, Dishwasher Safe
features: CLASSIC RIBBED DESIGN: Add vintage charm to your kitchen with Tala’s iconic ribbed glass ramekin, perfect for both professional chefs and home bakers
MULTI-PURPOSE USE: Ideal for soufflés, crème Brulé, dips, sauces, nuts, or prepping ingredients, a must-have for cooking and serving in style
OVEN & DISHWASHER SAFE: Made from durable, heat-resistant glass that withstands oven baking and frequent dishwasher cycles without losing clarity or strength
PERFECT POTION SIZE: With a 190ml capacity, this ramekin is just right for individual servings of desserts, starters, and side dishes
TRUSTED TALA QUALITY: From a brand with over 100 years of baking heritage, this ramekin combines functionality with timeless design
description: Elevate your baking and serving game with the Tala Ribbed Glass Ramekin, a classic kitchen essential trusted by generations. With its vintage ribbed glass design and practical 200ml capacity, this versatile ramekin is perfect for individual desserts like crème Brulé, soufflés, and puddings, or as a stylish dish for snacks, dips, and prep ingredients. Crafted from toughened, heat-resistant glass, it’s safe for oven use and cleans effortlessly in the dishwasher. Whether you're plating a gourmet dessert or organising your mise end place, Tala’s ramekin delivers professional results with timeless style
